chunks.text: Michael Orshansky named to eSilicon Technical Advisory Board - EECS at Berkeley EECS alumnus Michael Orshansky (B.S./M.S./Ph.D. ’01, adviser: Chenming Hu) has been named to the technical advisory board of eSilicon, a leading provider of FinFET ASICs, market-specific IP platforms and 2.5D packaging solutions. Orshansky, who is currently a faculty fellow at the Department of Electrical and Computer Engineering at the University of Texas, researches approximate computing for on-chip machine learning acceleration. The board will focus on guiding the company’s development work associated with artificial intelligence ASICS. Categories Alumni Industry Research View Open Faculty Positions
